# orgChartEdge

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

CRUD operations for OrgChartEdge records via csdk CLI

## Usage

```bash
csdk org-chart-edge list
csdk org-chart-edge get --id <value>
csdk org-chart-edge create --entityId <value> --childId <value> --positionTitleTrgmSimilarity <value> --searchScore <value> [--parentId <value>] [--positionTitle <value>] [--positionLevel <value>]
csdk org-chart-edge update --id <value> [--entityId <value>] [--childId <value>] [--parentId <value>] [--positionTitle <value>] [--positionLevel <value>] [--positionTitleTrgmSimilarity <value>] [--searchScore <value>]
csdk org-chart-edge delete --id <value>
```

## Examples

### List all orgChartEdge records

```bash
csdk org-chart-edge list
```

### Create a orgChartEdge

```bash
csdk org-chart-edge create --entityId <value> --childId <value> --positionTitleTrgmSimilarity <value> --searchScore <value> [--parentId <value>] [--positionTitle <value>] [--positionLevel <value>]
```

### Get a orgChartEdge by id

```bash
csdk org-chart-edge get --id <value>
```
